before.title: Before you start:
before.usb: Enable USB Debugging on your Android.
before.cable: Connect the phone with a USB cable (the original is best).
before.unlocked: Keep the phone screen unlocked during the whole process.
before.connectNow: Now connect the phone to the computer

running.subtitle: Don't close this window. It takes between 5 and 15 minutes.

phaseStatus.waitingDevice: Connect your phone via USB. No device detected.
phaseStatus.waitingUsbAuth: Waiting for authorization on your phone. Accept «Allow USB debugging».
phaseStatus.deviceOffline: Device connected but not responding. Unlock it.
phaseStatus.iosTrust: Tap «Trust this computer» on the iPhone.

error.title: Something went wrong:
error.browserOnly: This feature is only available in the desktop app.

done.title: ✓ Analysis complete
done.subtitle: Report uploaded to the dashboard. A local copy was also saved to your Downloads folder.

account.signOutConfirm: Unlink this app from your account?

link.title: Link account
link.subtitle: Link this app to your web account to upload analyses automatically.

errors.format: The code must have the format XXX-XXX-XXX.

upload.openingReport: Your report is now available in your dashboard.
upload.noCreditsMessage: You have no credits left. Open your dashboard on the web and top up credits to upload the report.

errors.unauth: Session expired. Link the app again.

ios.title: Analyze iPhone
ios.subtitle: Set a password to encrypt the backup. It's required to analyze SMS, calls, Health and Keychain.
ios.step1: Connect the iPhone to the computer with a USB cable.
ios.step2: Unlock the iPhone and, if prompted, tap «Trust» on the phone screen.
ios.step3: Choose a password for the encrypted backup. Save it: if the iPhone already had an encrypted backup, it must be the same one from iTunes/Finder.
ios.passwordTooShort: The password must be at least 4 characters.

iosDrivers.title: Apple drivers are missing on this Windows
iosDrivers.body: For the computer to recognize the iPhone we need Apple Mobile Device drivers. We can't bundle them in our app due to Apple's license. The quickest way is to install the free «Apple Devices» app from the Microsoft Store.
iosDrivers.fallbackBody: If the Microsoft Store isn't available on your machine, you can use Apple's official iTunes installer as an alternative.
